Patzer Pro Tracking Dashboard

Refresh Options

Opened via file:// — live refresh is unavailable. Choose an option below.

Rebuild & Reload

Run this command in your terminal, then reload the page.

npm run dashboard:generate

Then reload this page.

Use Live Server (Recommended)

Start the dev server to get live auto-refresh.

node server.mjs

Then open:

http://localhost:3001/docs/prompts/dashboard.html

Live mode fetches registry data directly — no rebuild needed.
